queries.query: Ship this validated feature
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; explicit ship verb + validated precondition.

queries.query: The wave is done, mark these ideas as shipped
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; batch-ship at wave close.

queries.query: Validation passed, move to archive
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; PASS → archive is the arc-ship transition.

queries.query: Wrap this one up — cw-validate said PASS
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'wrap this up' after PASS is ship intent.

queries.query: Cross it off — dark mode is done and validated
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'cross it off' means mark shipped.

queries.query: Put the SSO feature to bed now that it's through validation
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'put to bed' post-validation is ship.

queries.query: Archive the completed wave 3 ideas into the wave file
queries.rationale: Ship surface — wave-archive writing is arc-ship behaviour.

queries.query: Transition the spec-ready items to shipped after cw-validate passes
queries.rationale: Ship surface — state-transition spec-ready → shipped.

queries.query: Remove the dark-mode entry from BACKLOG — it's live in prod
queries.rationale: Ship surface — BACKLOG removal on ship.

queries.query: Close out the finished work and record it in the wave archive
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'close out' + 'wave archive' maps to ship.

queries.query: Write a validation report
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to /cw-validate (Appendix A); validation authoring runs before ship.

queries.query: What's pipeline health?
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-status (Appendix A); read-only health query.

queries.query: Audit whether any spec-ready ideas have missing validation reports
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-audit; diagnostic sweep, not the ship transition itself.

queries.query: Capture a new idea — ship tracking dashboard
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-capture; raw entry despite the word 'ship'.

queries.query: Plan the next wave with the remaining shaped ideas
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-wave; forward planning, not completion.

queries.query: Shape this customer request into a brief
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-shape; refinement, not completion.

queries.query: Update the README with the shipped features from wave 3
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-sync; README sync post-ship, not the archival action itself.

queries.query: Run the cw-validate pass on this spec
queries.rationale: Routes to /cw-validate; the prerequisite check, not ship.

queries.query: Deploy the new build to production
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; deployment tooling, not arc-ship's lifecycle marker.

queries.query: Tag the git repo with the latest release number
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; git/release tooling, not arc artifact transition.
